text: As I stand at the threshold of this glass-encased room, I am keenly aware of the boundary between interior and exterior spaces, as if pausing at the edge of understanding. Moving closer, the saturated colors and glowing screens within the R+D showcase evoke curiosity and anticipation. Here, technology and human endeavor are fused, sparking thoughts about progress, collaboration, and the thin line between creation and contemplation. I feel inquisitive, somewhat humbled by the collective intellect on display, and quietly hopeful about the potential for new ideas born within such spaces.
